subject: INTEGRAL ToO observation of the AXP 1E 1547.0-5408
body:
D. Gotz (CEA Saclay) on behalf of a larger collaboration reports:

The INTEGRAL satellite will observe the on going outburst of the AXP  
1E 1547.0-5408 (Krimm et al.GCN 8311, 8312, 8318; Rea et al. GCN  
8313; Esposito et al. Atel 1763) starting on October 8th 2008 at  
21:35 UT, until October 10th at 04:53 UT.

Simultaneous observations at other wavelengths are encouraged.

For last minute changes to the INTEGRAL schedule see

http://integral.esac.esa.int/isocweb/schedule.html?action=intro
